user.title: HA Auto Updater
user.description: Choose how often Auto Updater checks for updates and when it runs. A backup (if enabled) is only taken when updates are actually installed — never on its own.

data.frequency: How often to check for updates
data.retry_delay: Wait before retrying a failed install
data.notify_on_new_updates: Notify when new updates are detected

data_description.frequency: How often Auto Updater looks for and installs updates. Hourly runs at the top of every hour and ignores the time and day below; Daily runs once a day at the time below; Weekly runs once a week on the day and time below. (A background scan also refreshes the pending count every 30 minutes, but never installs.)
data_description.time_of_day: The time the Daily or Weekly run happens. Ignored when frequency is Hourly.
data_description.day_of_week: Only used when frequency is set to Weekly.
data_description.pre_notify_delay: Minutes to wait (with a heads-up notification) before installing. 0 = install immediately.
data_description.stagger_delay: Seconds to pause between each individual update. 0 = no pause.
data_description.retry_delay: Seconds to wait before the single automatic retry of a failed install.
data_description.max_updates_per_run: Cap on how many updates install per run. Leave at 0 for unlimited.
data_description.backup_keep_days: Only used when 'Auto-Purge Old Backups' is on. Pre-update backups older than this many days are deleted.
data_description.notify_service: Optional. e.g. notify.mobile_app_my_phone — forwards alerts to your phone.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Auto Updater is allowed.

init.title: Auto Updater Settings
init.description: Choose how often Auto Updater checks for updates and when it runs. A backup (if enabled) is only taken when updates are actually installed — never on its own. Feature toggles (backup, notifications, debug, etc.) are switches on the device page.

data.frequency: How often to check for updates
data.retry_delay: Wait before retrying a failed install
data.notify_on_new_updates: Notify when new updates are detected
